channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: American figure skater Alysa Liu takes the lead on the opening night of the world championships
item.description: BOSTON (AP) — Alysa Liu rarely wavers when it comes to anything, whether it be her abrupt decision to retire after the 2022 Winter Olympics, or the American figure skater's similarly stunning decision to announce her comeback early last year.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: LeBron James beats buzzer with tip to lift Lakers past Pacers and keep record streak alive
item.description: INDIANAPOLIS (AP) — LeBron James had a buzzer-beating tip-in to cap a 10-point fourth quarter, Luka Doncic scored 34 points and the Los Angeles Lakers beat the Indiana Pacers 120-119 on Wednesday night. James extended his NBA-record streak of 10 or more points to 1,283 games — barely.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL MAROT, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Mississippi State's Chandler Prater faces online criticism following JuJu Watkins injury
item.description: Mississippi State's Chandler Prater has disabled the comment section on her social media amid growing backlash that followed JuJu Watkins injury in the women's NCAA Tournament.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Love affair back on at March Madness. Now with Arizona, Caleb Love takes on Duke again
item.description: NEWARK, N.J. (AP) — He's back. If there's a single player Duke or any of its fans would love to not run into when the stakes are this high, Caleb Love would be that player. Love used to play for Duke's biggest rival, North Carolina. Now he plays for Duke's next opponent, Arizona.
item.dc:creator: EDDIE PELLS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Bryan Hodgson named University of South Florida head men's basketball coach
item.description: Bryan Hodgson, one of the nation’s top recruiters and a rising head coach, has been named the University of South Florida head men’s basketball coach, Vice President for Athletics Michael Kelly announced Monday.
item.dc:creator: Merissa Lynn, USF Athletics, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Late boxing legend George Foreman had deep ties to this East Bay city
item.description: (KRON) -- Boxing legend and former heavyweight champion George Foreman died last Friday at the age of 76. Foreman was born in Texas. However, after a troubled upbringing, he then moved to the West Coast after ninth grade when he enrolled in President Lyndon B. Johnson's Job Corps work program.
item.dc:creator: Aaron Tolentino, KRON4

item.title: WWE legend Kane says Dems have 'real issue' with masculinity
item.description: WWE Hall of Famer Kane — also known as Glenn Jacobs, mayor of Knox County, Tennessee — joined "Morning in America.
item.dc:creator: Patrick Djordjevic, NewsNation

item.title: San Diego FC dealt first loss in inaugural season
item.description: San Diego FC lost its first game of the season thus far on Sunday when the club fell 2-1 to Austin FC at Q2 Stadium in Texas.
item.dc:creator: Danielle Dawson, Fox 5

item.title: Ryan Donato, Connor Bedard lead Blackhawks over Flyers 7-4
item.description: Ryan Donato scored twice, Connor Bedard had a goal and an assist, and the Chicago Blackhawks beat the Philadelphia Flyers 7-4 on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: In March Madness, BYU gets a stop, then gets to go ... to Sweet 16 with 91-89 win over Wisconsin
item.description: The BYU Cougars led the entire game Saturday but still had to make one, final defensive stop against Wisconsin's irrepressible guard, John Tonje, to seal a 91-89 victory over the Badgers and the program's first trip to the Sweet 16 since 2011 — the days of Jimmer Fredette.
item.dc:creator: EDDIE PELLS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Dodgers-Cubs opener in Tokyo averages more than 25 million viewers in Japan, a record audience
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Tuesday's first game of the Tokyo Series averaged more than 25 million viewers in Japan according to Major League Baseball, making it the most-watched MLB game in the country's history.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Sexton scores 30, but Jazz fall to Boston, 121-99
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Collin Sexton matched a season-high with 30 points, but the Utah Jazz were no match for the defending NBA champion Boston Celtics in a 121-99 loss Friday night at the Delta Center. The Jazz (16-55) have now dropped 11 of its last 12 games.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Browns sign former Bears' guard Teven Jenkins
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — The Cleveland Browns announced they have signed former Chicago Bears offensive lineman Teven Jenkins Thursday afternoon. Jenkins is entering his fifth season in the NFL after spending his first four seasons playing for the Bears.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: San Diego Wave FC renews broadcast partnership with FOX 5/KUSI
item.description: San Diego Wave FC has renewed its broadcast partnership with FOX 5 and KUSI, giving fans another way to watch select matches locally.
item.dc:creator: Danielle Dawson, Fox 5
